title: planchonella cauliflora
intro: Planchonella cauliflora, also known as the wild plum or mountain apple, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. The medicinal properties of Planchonella cauliflora include its ability to treat various health issues, such as diarrhea, fever, and skin conditions, due to its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of using this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures.
